allow: Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python evaluate.py ai_tuned ai -n 100 --no-tqdm --pattern-a learned_eval/results/iter1.json 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import pickle
with open\('learned_eval/data/positions_human.pkl', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = pickle.load\(f\)
print\(f'Count: {len\(data\)}'\)
print\(f'Tuple len: {len\(data[0]\)}'\)
print\(f'Sample: {data[0]}'\)
")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "import numpy as np; a = np.load\('learned_eval/results_cycle1/pattern_values.npy'\); print\(a.dtype, a.shape, a[:5]\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from ai import _load_pattern_values, _DEFAULT_PATTERN_PATH
pv, el = _load_pattern_values\(_DEFAULT_PATTERN_PATH\)
print\('eval_length:', el, 'pv size:', len\(pv\), 'sample:', pv[:5]\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import ai_cpp
bot = ai_cpp.MinimaxBot\(time_limit=0.1\)
print\(f'ai_cpp loaded: pair_moves={bot.pair_moves}, time_limit={bot.time_limit}'\)

from game import HexGame
game = HexGame\(\)
move = bot.get_move\(game\)
print\(f'Empty board move: {move}'\)

game.make_move\(0, 0\)
game.make_move\(1, 0\)
game.make_move\(0, 1\)
move = bot.get_move\(game\)
print\(f'Move with stones: {move}, depth={bot.last_depth}, nodes={bot._nodes}'\)
print\('ai_cpp OK'\)
")
